3264180.name: Eden: Salvation
3264180.description:
Welcome to the world of Eden. In this world animal hybrids are the last living species. Play as different animals and level up by killing enemies and increasing your general level for more stats. The mystery of why this is all happening is still at large, but for now fight your way through endless hordes and explore your surroundings. 

Abominations exist in this land, hybrids of the unspeakable and they are massive. Where could they be? That is for you to go to find them.

Explore the areas to find hidden lore, fight different hybrids, and learn about the characters you play as. Activate skills and talents which are earned by getting kills and experience!

This Game Includes Keyboard and Controller Support:

WASD, Left Joystick - Movement

Left Click, Right Trigger - Attack

E, (X or Square) - Ability

ESC, Pause Button - Pause

Enter, A - Select

~ - Hide UI
